rules.name: Bind to all interfaces
rules.description: Service or firewall rule exposed to all IPv4/IPv6 sources.
rules.remediation: Restrict to specific CIDR ranges or an internal load balancer.

rules.name: SSH port opened publicly
rules.description: SSH (port 22) opened in an ingress or firewall rule.
rules.remediation: Use a bastion host or VPN; never expose 22 to the internet.

rules.name: Firewall deny rule removed
rules.description: A default-deny or deny-all rule was deleted, widening exposure.
rules.remediation: Restore default-deny posture; add explicit allow rules instead.

rules.name: NodePort / hostNetwork enabled
rules.description: Workload bound directly to node network, bypassing service mesh/LB controls.
rules.remediation: Prefer ClusterIP + Ingress; avoid hostNetwork unless strictly required.

rules.name: Hardcoded secret or credential
rules.description: A credential appears in plaintext inside a config file.
rules.remediation: Move to a secrets manager (Vault, AWS SM, sealed-secrets); rotate the exposed credential immediately.

rules.name: Authentication disabled
rules.description: Authentication turned off or anonymous access enabled.
rules.remediation: Re-enable authentication; if a public endpoint is intended, isolate it behind a gateway.

rules.name: Debug mode enabled
rules.description: Debug mode leaks stack traces, internals and sometimes credentials.
rules.remediation: Disable debug in any environment reachable beyond localhost.

rules.name: TLS verification disabled
rules.description: Certificate verification switched off — enables man-in-the-middle.
rules.remediation: Re-enable verification; pin an internal CA bundle for private certs.

rules.name: Plaintext / legacy protocol
rules.description: Traffic downgraded to an unencrypted or deprecated protocol.
rules.remediation: Use HTTPS/SFTP; restrict TLS to 1.2+ with modern ciphers.

rules.name: Weak cipher or hash configured
rules.description: Cryptographically weak cipher or hash referenced in config.
rules.remediation: Move to AES-GCM / ChaCha20 ciphers and SHA-256+ hashes.

rules.name: Resource limits removed or unbounded
rules.description: CPU/memory/connection limits deleted — one workload can starve the node.
rules.remediation: Restore requests/limits; enforce with LimitRange or quota.

rules.name: Replica count raised sharply or unbounded
rules.description: Very large replica/worker count can exhaust cluster capacity.
rules.remediation: Set HPA bounds that match actual node capacity.

rules.name: Privileged container / root user
rules.description: Container granted root or full host privileges.
rules.remediation: Run as non-root, drop capabilities, set allowPrivilegeEscalation: false.

rules.name: Wildcard RBAC / IAM grant
rules.description: Wildcard permission grants full access to all resources/actions.
rules.remediation: Scope to the exact verbs/resources needed; least privilege.

rules.name: World-writable permissions
rules.description: Files or mounts writable by any user on the host.
rules.remediation: Tighten to 640/750; give write access only to the owning service account.
